title: stelis aurea
intro: Stelis aurea, also known as the Golden Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis aurea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to act as a natural antipyretic to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Stelis aurea include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a medicinal tea or by boiling the plant's roots and rhizomes to create a medicinal decoction.
